---
description: "UI/UX Pro Max workflow (design system + implementation)"
argument-hint: "Describe the UI/UX task, product type, style, and stack"
---
Use the workflow guide at [ui-ux-pro-max/PROMPT.md](ui-ux-pro-max/PROMPT.md).

Ask for missing requirements (product type, industry, style keywords, target stack). Then:
1) Run the design system step first.
2) Use additional domain searches only if needed.
3) Apply stack-specific guidance.
4) Implement the UI with the generated design system.
